title: When You Say Nothing At All

alignedLyrics: It's _ amazing _ how _ you _ can speak right _ to my heart _ Without
_ saying _ _ a word _ you can light _ up the dark _
_ Try as I may _ I could never _ explain _ _ _ What I hear _ when
you don't _ say a thing _ _ The smile on your face lets me know
that you need me _ There's a truth in your eyes _ saying _ you'll _ never leave _ me _ The touch

at all _ when you say nothing _ at all _ _ _ _
